attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, 
'REVENUE' BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,    
BK_PRODUCT_KEY,                
GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,             
BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
BK_REV_MEASURE_TRNSCTN_TYPE_CD,
DV_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT,
BK_PRDT_SUBGROUP_ALLOC_SRC_CD,
BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' BK_SRC_RPRTD_SRVC_CONTRACT_NUM,
COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
'UNK' BK_COMPANY_CD,          
'UNK' BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
'SERVICE' DV_PRODUCT_TYPE,            
DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
'CISCO' CE_COUNTRY_NAME  ,             
-999 END_CUSTOMER_KEY   ,           
-999 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,          
-999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
-999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  , 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
DV_PNL_REV_COST_TYPE,
DEAL_SS_CD,
DV_DEAL_ID,
DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_PNL_REV_CST_MSR_SVC_REV_RTR GL
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PNL_MTH_CNTL_SRVC_REV_RTR WI
ON GL.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE WI.RUN_BATCH_ID IN (1,2)

SELECT 
BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, 
'REVENUE' BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,    
BK_PRODUCT_KEY,                
GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,             
BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
BK_REV_MEASURE_TRNSCTN_TYPE_CD,
DV_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT,
BK_PRDT_SUBGROUP_ALLOC_SRC_CD,
BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' BK_SRC_RPRTD_SRVC_CONTRACT_NUM,
COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
'UNK' BK_COMPANY_CD,          
'UNK' BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
'SERVICE' DV_PRODUCT_TYPE,            
DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
'CISCO' CE_COUNTRY_NAME  ,             
-999 END_CUSTOMER_KEY   ,           
-999 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,          
-999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
-999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  , 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
DV_PNL_REV_COST_TYPE,
DEAL_SS_CD,
DV_DEAL_ID,
DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_PNL_REV_CST_MSR_SVC_REV_RTR GL
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PNL_MTH_CNTL_SRVC_REV_RTR WI
ON GL.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE WI.RUN_BATCH_ID IN (3,4)
